description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 6. Stable, cache-friendly observation block layout**.

Goal: add tests/snapshots showing semantically unchanged OM content remains stable and the single-string fallback preserves the same logical segmentation as a future multi-message layout.

Relevant test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/engine-build-context.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/extension/lifecycle-before-agent-start.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/extension/lifecycle-session-before-compact.test.ts`

Worker notes:
- assert stability for unchanged durable sections and localized diffs for volatile sections
- snapshots are fine if they stay readable and intentional
- this ticket should make later Tier 2 work safer by locking down layout behavior
title: Add cache-stability regression coverage for OM rendering and segmented fallback layout
